case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION VS. RAUL LOPEZ GUERRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION & NOTICE OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT --- ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION SERVED JAN-18-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAUL LOPEZ
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAUL LOPEZ
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,455.77 AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAUL LOPEZ

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, RAUL LOPEZ $2,019.00 PRINCIPAL, $293.87 INTEREST, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,408.87, TOTAL $ 2,408.87 . ALL FURTHER PROCESS TO BE DONE BY THE DEFAULT SECTION. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
